full_text: Next up, we are going to talk about the span element. The span element is like a div. The function of div is to group elements. The span element is also called a group element. It has no internal functionality for which it is used. If we talk about the span element, we have a generic container which is called html elements, which is called group together. But the major difference between span and div is that div is my block element whereas span is my inline element. If I want to connect some elements, but I don't want them to occupy a line separately, then I can group them with the help of span element or span tag. Let's take a look at this example. I defined three anchor tags in my html code. So, I had grouped them in div first. What am I going to do this time? I am going to group them in the span tag. This is my opening tag for the span. This is my closing tag. Let's do this same and I am going to do refresh this time. So, if I refresh, then Google and YouTube, the two anchor tags that went into the span, are still in the same line. It's not like they have changed their line. We can inspect this too. Here, if I inspect, then the group of these two has been formed in this span. This is the span in which both the anchor tags have been grouped. So, if I want to apply a style or a property, which I want to apply on two anchor tags, then I can directly associate that property with the span. This example can be used for people who are from Kora. Usually, they are on the time of JEE. Before college admissions, usually, what are the things that are there in the colleges? To explore things like that, we explored things in our time, at least in 2017. We explored in the 12th class. Here, like many things on Kora, memes are available. But if I inspect this page, then I get to know that after inspecting, the name of everything on Kora, like the name of this page, is a span. Here, Vishal Goyal is also a span. In the next line, if I look at the next name, this is also a span. This is also a span. This is also a span. This is how the names defined on Kora are all span. So, all the properties that we apply on the span, will automatically be attached to all these names by default. So, this is an example of showing the span and divs. We will explore span and divs in more detail while studying CSS.
